items.title: Sony’s white INZONE ANC wireless gaming earbuds with spatial audio hits lowest price of the year at 25% off for Memorial Day
items.summary:
As part of the ongoing Memorial Day sale, Amazon is currently offering Sony’s white INZONE Buds wireless gaming earbuds for $178 shipped. Normally priced at $238, this deal knocks $60 off the usual price, landing at a solid 25% discount. While we did see them dip to $144 briefly ahead of Black Friday last year, they haven’t returned anywhere near that low since. Today’s offer marks the lowest price we’ve tracked on the white model in 2026, making it a great time to pick up a pair. The black one is also down to $178 right now if white isn’t your style, so you can grab whichever color suits you best after checking out the details below.

We’ve had another jam-packed week of Green Deals that will be joining the past week’s sales leading us up and through Memorial Day, but there are four standouts amongst the bunch that are all brand new launches! First, we are very excited to welcome back Juiced Bikes to the land of the living, as the brand is officially relaunching after its 2024 financial trouble with the new Scrambler Moto-Style e-bikes + $245 FREE bundles starting from $1,699. Right behind it is Lectric’s new XPress2 Long-Range Commuter and Cruiser e-bikes with $336 FREE bundles at $1,399, as well as the early-bird deal on Heybike’s Saturn Moped-Style e-bikes starting from $999. Lastly, we also have a pre-sale means to score Anker’s upcoming SOLIX S2000 Portable Power Station for $599 (over its $689 launch price on June 2), and tons of other amazing deals waiting for you below.
